data.biography:
Byungchan (병찬), also referred to by his full name Choi Byungchan, is a South Korean singer under Play M Entertainment. He is a member of the boy group VICTON.

In May 2019, he, alongside Seungwoo, became a contestant on the competition show Produce X 101. However, on July 11, it was announced he would be leaving the show due to health issues.
data.name: Choi Byung-chan

data.biography: 韩国男歌手、舞者和演员，在韩国男子团体VICTON内担任副唱。2016年11月9日，透过首张迷你专辑《Voice To New World》，以主打歌《I'm fine》出道，曾参加大热选秀《Produce X 101》，因腿伤中途退赛。2020年，通过JTBC迷你剧《Live》作为演员出道。
data.name: 崔秉灿

data.biography: 韓國男歌手、舞者和演員，在韓國男子團體 VICTON 內擔任副唱。2016 年 11 月 9 日，透過首張迷你專輯《Voice To New World》，以主打歌《I'm fine》出道，曾參加大熱選秀《Produce X 101》，因腿傷中途退賽。2020 年，通過 JTBC 迷你劇《Live》作為演員出道。
data.name: 崔秉燦
